evidence.span_text: Net revenue retention | 106.0% | 104.0% | Trailing 12-month cohort basis

verdict.rationale: The operations review reports Q4 2025 net revenue retention on a trailing 12-month cohort basis as 106.0%, contradicting the master document's claimed 108.0%. The customer appendix contains no net revenue retention figure despite being the expected evidence type.
verdict.suggested_action: Reconcile the 2-percentage-point discrepancy between the master document (108.0%) and the operations review (106.0%), and confirm the correct cohort definition before publishing.
